what_it_does: Defines the HTML entry point for a ConceptV Vi UI kit page, loads shared and Vi-specific styles, mounts an empty app container, and loads React, ReactDOM, Babel, and local JSX component files.
observations: Includes a dsCard metadata comment with group, name, subtitle, and viewport.

Provides a single
mount target.
Uses React 18.3.1, ReactDOM 18.3.1, and Babel Standalone 7.29.0 from unpkg with integrity and crossorigin attributes.
Loads six local JSX files as type="text/babel" scripts in component-to-app order.
standouts: The file is a static browser shell for a React-based UI kit.
The dsCard comment carries design-system catalog metadata outside runtime code.
Local JSX modules are loaded directly in the browser through Babel Standalone.
conventions: Uses a minimal HTML document structure with external CSS and script includes.
Keeps page behavior in separate JSX files rather than inline script.
Uses Subresource Integrity and crossorigin for CDN scripts.
Uses development UMD builds and in-browser JSX transformation.
concerns: Runtime depends on external CDN availability for React, ReactDOM, and Babel.
Uses React development builds and browser-side Babel transformation.
notes: This file is the cataloged HTML shell that assembles the Vi UI kit surface from styles and JSX components.
questions: Is the CDN-plus-Babel setup intended only for static handoff review?
How is the dsCard metadata consumed?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated UI kit purpose matches the file's actual role as an HTML shell for the Vi workspace kit.
intention_signals: It appears intended to make the Vi AI workspace UI kit directly viewable in a browser while preserving catalog metadata and loading the component set in order.
novelty: The dsCard metadata comment embeds catalog-facing descriptive fields and viewport information directly in the HTML file.
contribution: Provides a self-contained HTML entry point and metadata wrapper for the Vi AI workspace UI kit, including style dependencies, runtime dependencies, mount target, and component load order.
summary_for_embedding: HTML entry point for the ConceptV Vi UI kit that loads shared and local styles, React/Babel runtime scripts, and JSX components into a single app mount.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for presenting a cataloged, browser-runnable Vi AI workspace design-system surface composed from local React JSX components.
